hero.subtitle: Deploy autonomous AI agents to explore Mars. Watch them reason, adapt, and collaborate in real-time through a stunning mission control interface.

mission.label: Mission Briefing
mission.title: Autonomous Mars Exploration
mission.description: Three AI agents — Rover, Drone, and Station — coordinate through a central mission control to explore the Martian surface. Each agent runs its own reasoning loop, making real-time decisions based on terrain, weather, and mission objectives.

agents.label: Meet the Agents
agents.title: Your Mars Team
agents.rover_desc: Navigates the Martian terrain, drills for core samples, and analyzes geological formations. Makes autonomous decisions about exploration routes based on drone intel and storm conditions.
agents.drone_desc: Scans vast terrain areas from above, maps safe routes for the rover, and relays critical environmental data. Provides probabilistic assessments of rock compositions.
agents.station_desc: Manages power distribution across all agents, monitors system health, and broadcasts alerts. Ensures the team stays operational through dust storms and equipment challenges.

items.title: LLM-Powered Reasoning
items.desc: Each agent runs Mistral AI reasoning loops, evaluating goals, proposing actions, and adapting to changing conditions in real-time.

items.title: Probabilistic Goals
items.desc: Goals track confidence scores from 0.0 to 1.0, dynamically updating as agents gather data and complete objectives.

items.title: Real-Time Streaming
items.desc: Watch agent decisions, tool calls, and world state updates stream live through WebSocket connections.

items.title: AI Narration
items.desc: Mistral AI generates live mission commentary with optional ElevenLabs voice synthesis for an immersive experience.

items.title: Dynamic World
items.desc: Mars environment with terrain hazards, dust storms, fog-of-war visibility, and geological formations that shift over time.

items.title: Multi-Agent Coordination
items.desc: Agents communicate through structured protocols — drone scouts inform rover decisions, station manages shared resources.

steps.title: Observe
steps.desc: Agents read world state — terrain, hazards, battery levels, storm intensity, and data from other agents.

steps.title: Reason
steps.desc: Mistral AI evaluates goals, assesses risks, and proposes the optimal next action with alternatives.

steps.title: Execute
steps.desc: Tool calls mutate the world state — move, drill, scan, charge — with progress streamed live.

steps.title: Adapt
steps.desc: Goal confidence updates dynamically. Agents re-evaluate plans as conditions change.

cta.title: Ready for Mars?
cta.subtitle: Launch the mission control interface and watch autonomous AI agents explore the Red Planet in real-time.

footer.built_with: Built with Mistral AI for the Mistral Hackathon
